name: Rep Performance Scorecard
description: Know which AEs are on track, which need coaching, and exactly where the mismatch between activity and outcome is hiding.
alsoSurfaces: Which AEs are on track vs. behind for the quarter?
Where is high activity not translating into outcomes?
Where is low activity producing outsized results, and what are they doing?
Which behaviors correlate with quota attainment?
beforeWeRun: Performance period: current quarter or rolling 90 days?
Activity sources: Outreach, Gong, Salesforce tasks?
Outcome metric: pipeline created, closed-won, or both?

whatYoullGet.name: Per-rep scorecard
whatYoullGet.desc: Activity, outcomes, attainment side-by-side per AE.

whatYoullGet.name: Activity → outcome correlation
whatYoullGet.desc: Scatter showing where activity does and doesn't convert.

whatYoullGet.name: Coaching list
whatYoullGet.desc: Reps where activity is high but outcomes are lagging: likely coaching candidates.

whatYoullGet.name: Top performer behaviors
whatYoullGet.desc: Common patterns across reps exceeding plan.

whatYoullGet.name: Trend
whatYoullGet.desc: How team-wide attainment is moving week-over-week.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your rep scorecard in ~9 min.
